titleStmt.title: SII 34.76: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 76. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Some part of the inscription seems to the palimpsest. It records that a local Brāhmaṇa made an endowment of 15 kaḻañju of gold for making gift to a flawless reciter (kalamaṟuttu nallārāṉār) of some specified part of the Taḷavakāra-sāmavēda on the day of Tiruvādirai in the month of Mārgaḻi. [Compare SII, Vol. XIII, No. 250 from Kōyiltēvarāyanpēṭṭai which is similar to this].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī cālai kalamaṟutta kOrājarājakEcarivarmmakku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu makaranāyaṟṟu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam kāmaravalliccaturvvedi maṅkalattu cOḻa mahādeviccEri kOṭṭaiyūr cāvānti dattaṉ tattaṉ Ittiruṉallūr mahāde
varvacam dharmma vṛttiyāṟ polivatākak kuṭutta poṉ kaḻañciṟ pērttu mutal 10 5 m Ippoṉ patiṉaiṅkaḻañcukkum palicaiyāṉa poṉ Āṭṭaivaṭṭam 2 Ivvirukaḻañcē kālum samvatsaram prati cantrādittavaṟ Iddevar tīrtthamāṭiṉa māka
ḻittiruvātirai ñāṉṟu pakal Iddevar dīrtthamāṭa Eḻuntaruḷuvutaṟku muṉpu Itiṉ muṉṉai Iravu talavakāra sāmavēdikaḷ vantār Ellām makiḻa mēlpātattoru turuvum kīḻpātattoru turuvum Ipparicutāṉ Orukkālum koṇṭilātārkēy karaiyiṭṭu piḻaiyāmal Ovvor turuvum piḻaiyāmai coṉṉārai Orukkā
ṭṭu tīṭṭil mēkkāṭṭiṉār Ellām Iraṇṭu pādattum Ōttuc colli kalamaṟuttu Oruvar kalamaṟuti colli ṉallārāṉār kaiyilē ppoṉ kaḻañcēkālum Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 34.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
